name: Card-Not-Present: Email Domain Mismatch
description: Transactions where payer and recipient email domains differ significantly. Common in CNP fraud where attacker uses a free email domain (gmail, yahoo) to receive goods at a different address. Billing and shipping emails don't match — classic fraud indicator.
ieee_cis_context: Email mismatch is a known strong signal in IEEE-CIS; see public kernels for domain analysis
